hero.headline: Temperature, Engineered.

intro.label: A climate studio, not a break-fix shop
intro.body: A modern climate-control studio for Bainbridge Island and North Seattle. Heat pumps, furnaces, AC — properly load-calculated, cleanly installed, and backed by a ten-year labor warranty.

personas.label: Residential Homes
personas.kicker: For the home you live in

personas.label: Light Commercial
personas.kicker: For the shop, office, or bistro

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get a written system estimate in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Answer four questions about your home and our virtual estimator returns equipment options, rebate eligibility, and a transparent price range — before a single sales call.

zPatternRows.label: The Heat-Pump Story
zPatternRows.headline: Heat pumps are the future. Seattle is ground zero.
zPatternRows.body: Cold-climate heat pumps now perform at 5°F and below. Between PSE incentives, the federal 25C tax credit, and long-term operating cost, the right heat pump can pay for itself inside a decade. We handle the rebate paperwork so the savings don't get left on the table.

zPatternRows.label: Proper Load Calc
zPatternRows.headline: Load calculated, not eyeballed.
zPatternRows.body: Most HVAC failures trace back to equipment that was the wrong size for the house. We run a proper Manual J load calculation on every install, evaluate the ductwork, and seal the leaks that quietly burn efficiency. The right-sized system is the one that lasts.

zPatternRows.label: Emergency Response
zPatternRows.headline: We show up when it's 19° and the furnace is out.
zPatternRows.body: No-heat calls jump to the top of the schedule during cold snaps. On-site within hours, diagnosis explained in plain English, written quote before any work, truck stocked with the common parts — because a cold house at 5am isn't a tomorrow problem.

zPatternRows.label: The Warranty
zPatternRows.headline: Ten years of labor, in writing.
zPatternRows.body: Equipment warranty is only as good as the labor warranty behind it. Every install we do is backed by ten years of labor coverage — not the industry-standard two. Combine it with a maintenance plan and your system is covered end-to-end.
